traits.name: Hustle
entries: The smuggler can move through the space of any creature that is of a larger size, but it can't stop there.

actions.name: Shortsword
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* 4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) Poison damage.

actions.name: Pistol
entries: *Ranged Weapon Attack:* 4, range 30/90 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d10 + 2) Piercing damage.

traits.name: Hustle
entries: The underboss can move through the space of any creature that is of a larger size, but it can't stop there.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The underboss makes three attacks, using Poisoned Blade or Arcane Firearm in any combination.

actions.name: Poisoned Blade
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* 7, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 13 (2d8 + 4) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the start of the underboss's next turn. If the target is already Poisoned, it instead takes an extra 7 (2d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Arcane Firearm
entries: *Ranged Weapon Attack:* 7, range 30/90 ft. *Hit:* 26 (4d10 + 4) Force damage.

reactions.name: Uncanny Dodge
entries: The underboss is hit by an attack roll. {@actResponse The underboss halves the damage (round down) it takes from that attack.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The artificer casts one of the following spells, using its Tinker's Tools as an Arcane Focus and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):
At will: Burning Hands (level 3 version), Mending, Thunderwave (level 3 version)
1e/day: Cure Wounds, Invisibility

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The artificer makes two attacks, using Battering Mace or Artillery Strike in any combination.

actions.name: Battering Mace
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* 6, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 14 (3d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage, and if the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Artillery Strike
entries: *Ranged Weapon Attack:* 6, range 120 ft. *Hit:* 22 (4d8 + 4) Force damage.

traits.name: Blood Frenzy
entries: The bruiser has Advantage on attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its Hit Points.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The bruiser makes three Pummel attacks and uses Glare.

actions.name: Pummel
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* 9, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 12 (2d6 + 5) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Glare
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 14, one creature the bruiser can see within 30 feet. *Failure:* The target has the Frightened condition until the start of the bruiser's next turn.

reactions.name: Smackback
entries: The bruiser takes damage from a creature within 5 feet. {@actResponse The bruiser makes one Pummel attack, targeting the triggering creature.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The raider has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the raider's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Pummel
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* 5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d4 + 3) Bludgeoning damage.

reactions.name: Smackback
entries: The raider takes damage from a creature within 5 feet. {@actResponse The raider makes one Pummel attack, targeting the triggering creature.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The infiltrator casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):
1/day: Synaptic Static
3/day: Detect Thoughts

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The infiltrator makes three Mind Blade attacks.

actions.name: Mind Blade
entries: *Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack:* 7, reach 5 ft. or range 30 ft. *Hit:* 14 (3d6 + 4) Psychic damage.

bonusActions.name: Mind Curse
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 15, one creature hit by the infiltrator's Mind Blade attack this turn. *Failure:* The target takes 14 (4d6) Psychic damage and is cursed. While cursed in this way, it has Disadvantage on attack rolls against the infiltrator, and the infiltrator always knows its location while it and the infiltrator are on the same plane of existence. A cursed creature repeats the save whenever it finishes a Short Rest or Long Rest, ending the effect on itself on a success. *Success:* Half damage only.

spellcasting.name: Slayer's Puppet (1/Day)
entries: The mindkiller casts Dominate Person, requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17).
1/day: Dominate Person

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The mindkiller makes two Nightmare Whisper attacks.

actions.name: Nightmare Whisper
entries: *Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack:* 9, reach 5 ft. or range 30 ft. *Hit:* 27 (5d8 + 5) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the start of the mindkiller's next turn. If the target is already Frightened, it instead takes an extra 10 (3d6) Psychic damage.

actions.name: Primal Fear (1/Day)
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 17, each creature in a 30-foot-radius Sphere [Area of Effect] centered on a point the mindkiller can see within 120 feet. *Failure:* 35 (10d6) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the start of the mindkiller's next turn. While Frightened in this way, the target can do only one of the following on each of its turns: move, take an action, or take a Bonus Action. *Success:* Half damage only.

traits.name: Aura of Authority
entries: While in a 30-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the commander, the commander and its allies have Advantage on attack rolls and saving throws, provided the commander doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The commander makes two attacks, using Flail or Javelin in any combination.

actions.name: Flail
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* 6, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 8 (1d8 + 4) Bludgeoning damage—plus 7 (2d6) Necrotic damage if the commander is Bloodied—and the target has Disadvantage on its next attack roll before the start of the commander's next turn.

actions.name: Javelin
entries: *Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack:* 6, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d6 + 4) Piercing damage—plus 7 (2d6) Necrotic damage if the commander is Bloodied.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The knight makes two attacks, using Flail or Javelin in any combination.

actions.name: Flail
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* 5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage—plus 4 (1d8) Necrotic damage if the knight is Bloodied—and the target has Disadvantage on its next attack roll before the start of the knight's next turn.

actions.name: Javelin
entries: *Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack:* 5, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage—plus 4 (1d8) Necrotic damage if the knight is Bloodied.

traits.name: Hustle
entries: The troubleshooter can move through the space of any creature that is of a larger size, but it can't stop there.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The troubleshooter casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):
1e/day: Sleep, Unseen Servant

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The troubleshooter makes two Poisoned Dagger attacks.

actions.name: Poisoned Dagger
entries: *Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack:* 5, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d4 + 3) Piercing damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the start of the troubleshooter's next turn.

bonusActions.name: Nimble Escape
entries: The troubleshooter takes the Disengage or Hide action.

name: Homunculus Servant
hitPoints: 5 + 5 per spell level (the homunculus has a number of Hit Dice [d4s] equal to the spell's level)

traits.name: Evasion
entries: If the homunculus is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the homunculus instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the save and only half damage if it fails. It can't use this trait if it has the Incapacitated condition.

traits.name: Magic Bond
entries: Add the spell's level to any ability check or saving throw the homunculus makes.

actions.name: Force Strike
entries: *Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack:* Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, reach 5 ft. or range 30 ft. *Hit:* 1d6 + summonSpellLevel Force damage.

reactions.name: Channel Magic
entries: You cast a spell that has a range of touch while the homunculus is within 120 feet of you. {@actResponse The homunculus delivers the spell through its touch.

traits.name: Lucky
entries: When the medic rolls a 1 on the d20 of a D20 Test, it can reroll the die, and it must use the new roll.

spellcasting.name: Mark of Healing (2/Day)
entries: The medic casts Cure Wounds or Lesser Restoration, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability.
2/day: Cure Wounds, Lesser Restoration

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The medic makes two Radiant Burst attacks.

actions.name: Radiant Burst
entries: *Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack:* 5, reach 5 ft. or range 30 ft. *Hit:* 7 (2d6) Radiant damage, and the creature has the Blinded condition until the start of the medic's next turn.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The warden has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The warden casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):
At will: Alarm, Arcane Lock, Mage Armor (included in AC)
1/day: Dispel Magic

spellcasting.name: Protective Magic (3/Day)
entries: The warden casts Counterspell or Shield in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
3/day: Counterspell, Shield

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The warden makes two Arcane Whip attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Shackling Glyph if available.

actions.name: Arcane Whip
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* 6, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 13 (3d6 + 3) Force damage, and if the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition. If the target already has the Prone condition, the attack deals an extra 7 (2d6) Force damage.

actions.name: Shackling Glyph
entries: *Strength Saving Throw:* DC 14, one creature the warden can see within 60 feet. *Failure:* The creature has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14). While Grappled, the creature has the Restrained condition.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The scion casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):
At will: Elementalism, Gust of Wind, Thunderwave

spellcasting.name: Jump (2/Day)
entries: The scion casts Jump, requiring no spell components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
2/day: Jump

spellcasting.name: Feather Fall (2/Day)
entries: The scion casts Feather Fall in response to that spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
2/day: Feather Fall

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The scion makes two Thunderbolt attacks and uses Spellcasting.

actions.name: Thunderbolt
entries: *Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack:* 6, reach 5 ft. or range 30 ft. *Hit:* 11 (2d6 + 4) Lightning damage plus 9 (2d8) Thunder damage. Critical *Hit:* The creature also has the Deafened condition for 1 minute.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The inquisitive casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):
At Will : Guidance
1e/day: Detect Thoughts, See Invisibility

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The inquisitive makes three Crooked Staff attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Inquisitive Eye.

actions.name: Crooked Staff
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* 4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d8 + 2) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition. If the target already has the Prone condition, the attack deals an extra 7 (2d6) Radiant damage.

actions.name: Inquisitive Eye
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 13, one creature the inquisitive can see within 60 feet. *Failure:* 10 (3d6) Psychic damage, and the target is marked. The inquisitive has Advantage on attack rolls against a target it has marked. While marked, the target can't become hidden from the inquisitive, and if it has the Invisible condition, it gains no benefit from that condition against the inquisitive. The mark disappears after 1 minute or when the inquisitive uses this action again. *Success:* Half damage only.

reactions.name: Spontaneous Barrier 4
entries: The inquisitive or an ally it can see is hit with an attack roll. {@actResponse The inquisitive adds 2 to its or the ally's AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

spellcasting.name: Misty Step (2/Day)
entries: The enforcer casts Misty Step, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability.
2/day: Misty Step

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The enforcer makes three Dagger attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Lightning Cage if available.

actions.name: Dagger
entries: *Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack:* 6, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. *Hit:* 9 (2d4 + 4) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Lightning Cage 5
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 13, each creature in a 20-foot-radius Sphere [Area of Effect] centered on a point the enforcer can see within 60 feet. *Failure:* 13 (3d8) Lightning damage, and the creature can't take Reactions until the end of the enforcer's next turn. *Success:* Half damage only.

reactions.name: Temporal Disruption (1/Day)
entries: The enforcer takes damage from a melee attack. {@actResponse The enforcer teleports up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. Each creature within 10 feet of the space the enforcer left must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw, or its Speed is halved until the start of the enforcer's next turn.

spellcasting.name: Shield (3/Day)
entries: The marshal casts Shield in response to the spell's trigger, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability.
3/day: Shield

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The marshal makes three attacks, using Longsword or Pistol in any combination.

actions.name: Longsword
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* 7, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 13 (2d8 + 4) Slashing damage, and the target has Disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes before the start of the marshal's next turn.

actions.name: Pistol
entries: *Ranged Weapon Attack:* 7, range 30/90 ft. *Hit:* 15 (2d10 + 4) Piercing damage.

name: Shadow-Marked Agent
skills: perception: +6, performance: +6, sleight of hand: +8, stealth: +11

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The agent casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (DC 14):
At will: Disguise Self, Minor Illusion
1/day: Pass without Trace

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The agent makes two Shadow Knife attacks.

actions.name: Shadow Knife
entries: *Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack:* 8, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. *Hit:* 10 (2d4 + 5) Piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) Necrotic damage, and the target's Speed is reduced by 10 feet until the end of its next turn.

bonusActions.name: Shadow Cloak
entries: The agent has the Invisible condition until the start of its next turn. This invisibility ends early immediately after the agent makes an attack roll.

name: Sivis Scribe
languages: Common, Gnomish plus three other languages

traits.name: Words of Reason
entries: Allies in a 10-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the scribe have Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Charmed or Frightened condition. This trait doesn't function if the scribe has the Incapacitated condition.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The scribe casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (DC 13):
At will: Comprehend Languages, Mage Armor (included in AC), Message
1/Da y: Sending

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The scribe makes two Bursting Sigil attacks.

actions.name: Bursting Sigil
entries: *Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack:* 5, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. *Hit:* 13 (3d6 + 3) Radiant damage.

reactions.name: Word of Stasis 5
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 13, each creature in a 20-foot-radius Sphere [Area of Effect] centered on a point the scribe can see within 60 feet. *Failure:* The target has the Incapacitated condition until the start of the scribe's next turn. While the target is Incapacitated, its Speed is 0 and can't increase.

name: Steel Defender
hitPoints: 5 + five times your Artificer level (the defender has a number of Hit Dice [d8s] equal to your Artificer level)

traits.name: Steel Bond
entries: Add your Proficiency to any ability check or saving throw the defender makes.

actions.name: Force-Empowered Rend
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 1d8 + 2 plus your Intelligence modifier Force damage.

actions.name: Repair (3/Day)
entries: The defender, or one Construct or object it can see within 5 feet of itself, regains a number of Hit Points equal to 2d8 plus your Intelligence modifier.

reactions.name: Deflect Attack
entries: A creature the defender can see within 5 feet of itself makes an attack roll against a creature other than the defender. {@actResponse The triggering creature makes the attack roll with Disadvantage.

traits.name: Evasion
entries: If the marauder is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the marauder instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the save and only half as much damage if it fails. It can't use this trait if it has the Incapacitated condition.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The marauder casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Constitution as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17):
At will: Message
1/day: Disintegrate

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The marauder makes three Aberrant Strike attacks.

actions.name: Aberrant Strike
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* 7, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 13 (3d6 + 3) Piercing damage, plus 21 (6d6) Force damage if the marauder had Advantage on the attack roll.

bonusActions.name: Tear Through Space
entries: The marauder teleports to a space it can see within 30 feet, appearing in a dazzling flash. *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 17, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the marauder when it appears. *Failure:* The target has the Blinded condition until the end of the marauder's next turn.

traits.name: Aberrant Surge
entries: When the ruffian casts Witch Bolt, roll 1d8. On an even number, the ruffian gains a number of Temporary Hit Points equal to the number rolled. On an odd number, one creature of the ruffian's choice within 30 feet of it takes Force damage equal to the number rolled; if no other creatures are in range, it takes the damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The ruffian casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Constitution as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12, 4 to hit with spell attacks):
At will: Thaumaturgy
1/day: Witch Bolt

actions.name: Spear
entries: *Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack:* 4, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage.

name: Tharashk Hunter
languages: Common, Orc plus one other language

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The hunter makes three attacks, using Shortsword or Longbow in any combination.

actions.name: Shortsword
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* 7, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 11 (2d6 + 4) Piercing damage, and the target has Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks until the end of its next turn.

actions.name: Longbow
entries: *Ranged Weapon Attack:* 7, range 150/600 ft. *Hit:* 17 (3d8 + 4) Piercing damage, and the target's Speed is reduced by 10 feet until the end of its next turn.

bonusActions.name: Mark of Tharashk
entries: The hunter magically marks one creature it can see within 150 feet. The mark lasts for 1 hour, until the target dies, or until the hunter uses this Bonus Action again. While the target is marked in this way, the hunter has Advantage on attack rolls against the target, and the target gains no benefit from the Invisible condition against the hunter.

reactions.name: Uncanny Dodge
entries: The hunter is hit by an attack roll. {@actResponse The hunter halves the damage (round down) it takes from that attack.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
entries: Magic can't put the shadow walker to sleep.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the shadow walker has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The shadow walker casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17):
At will: Dancing Lights, Darkness, Minor Illusion

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The shadow walker makes three Gloom Burst attacks and uses Shadow Cowl.

actions.name: Gloom Burst
entries: *Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack:* 9, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. *Hit:* 14 (2d8 + 5) Psychic damage.

actions.name: Shadow Cowl
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 17, one creature the shadow walker can see within 120 feet. *Failure:* 14 (4d6) Necrotic damage, and the target has the Blinded condition until the start of the shadow walker's next turn.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The heir has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the heir's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The heir casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):
At will: Druidcraft, Light, Speak with Animals
1/day: Ice Storm
3e/day: Animal Friendship, Animal Messenger

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The heir makes four attacks, using Scimitar or Lunar Wisp in any combination.

actions.name: Scimitar
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* 5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d6 + 3) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Lunar Wisp
entries: *Ranged Weapon Attack:* 5, range 60 ft. *Hit:* 9 (2d8) Radiant damage, and the target emits Dim Light in a 10-foot radius and can't benefit from the Invisible condition until the end of the heir's next turn.

bonusActions.name: Spur Beast
entries: The heir targets a Beast it can see within 30 feet. The target can take a Reaction to move up to half its Speed and make one melee attack.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
entries: Magic can't put the stingblade to sleep.

actions.name: Stingblade
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* 4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) Poison damage.

actions.name: Boomerang
entries: *Ranged Weapon Attack:* 4, reach 30/120 ft. *Hit:* 7 (2d4 + 2) Bludgeoning damage.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
entries: Magic can't put the priest to sleep.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The priest casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13, 5 to hit with spell attacks):
At will: Dancing Lights, Ray of Sickness, Thaumaturgy
1e/day: Cure Wounds, Hold Person, Protection from Poison

actions.name: Venom Staff
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* 4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 9 (2d6 + 2) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of the priest's next turn.

bonusActions.name: Intensify Poison
entries: Each creature with the Poisoned condition within a 30-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the priest takes 3 (1d6) Poison damage.
